description:
You are a data-entry clerk for a sports science institute auditing the wger exercise database to ensure equipment dependencies are perfectly mapped for inventory tracking. Update the exercise 'Barbell Hip Thrust (Sports Science)' to include 'Bench' as a required piece of equipment in addition to the 'Barbell'.

URL: http://localhost/en/user/login

- Password: adminadmin
